column5: Re-introduced to this while watching the Olympics in a "dead air" period of no events in the stadium and no announcer talking, but obviously the in-house PA person was trying to get the hype going.

I saw DJ Mil put up Sledgehammer, so I gave that a spin. Then that got me on a Genesis / Phil Collins kick.  Definitely recommend a live version of Easy Lover -- like Paris '97 or Montreaux '04.... the energy is kicked up a notch in the live versions.
Bleachers made me nostalgic for Steel Train. Jack Antonoff does not miss.
It keeps playing during Olympic coverage and is always stuck in my head. But I'm not mad at it yet. And KPop Demon Hunters is also an amazing movie with an equally amazing soundtrack.
column6: Between Heated Rivalry and K-pop Demon Hunters, you've done more for mine and Jocelyn's 2025/2026 pop-culture cred than anyone, Mo Brown - DJ Chunk
